KOL & UGC Marketing

KOL & UGC Marketing

Built and ran Cookiy AI’s UGC creator program 0 to 1 across TikTok, Instagram, and YouTube Shorts — full-cycle managing 10+ creators from sourcing, brief, and review to post-campaign retrospective.

Creator playbook

The talking head formula

Never open with Cookiy. Open with the uncomfortable truth the viewer already knows. Drop into a casual real story. Introduce the tool through what it did, not what it is. State specific output. Close with a plain personal recommendation. CTA last.

103K → 41K: both talking heads. The formula is repeatable.

Comment-trigger CTA

Always: “Comment [WORD] and I’ll send you [specific thing].” Concentrated comment spike in the first hour is the strongest algorithmic signal on both platforms. One word per video — duplicating breaks the DM automation.

DM shares = top 3 ranking factor (Instagram, 2025).

Trending tool entry window

48–72h window where content referencing a trending tool gets pushed harder. Hook formula: “Everyone is building with [tool]. Nobody is checking if anyone wants what they’re building.” Then pivot to the validation problem.

Saves > shares > likes. Track the right metrics.

02

Paid Social & Search

Paid Ads & Search

Led growth paid acquisition across LinkedIn, X, and Google — covering audience segmentation, A/B testing, creative iteration, and weekly performance analysis from impression to site traffic quality.

LinkedIn served as the B2B awareness engine with 500K+ monthly impressions at CPM $5.3 / CPC $2.6; X delivered reach at scale with 3.5M+ monthly impressions at CPC $0.06 / CPM <$0.1; Google Search captured high-intent demand with $1.45 CPC and 2.99% monthly average CTR.
